name: Transformers: Rise of the Dark Spark

install_dir_names: Transformers - Rise of the Dark Spark

post_apply_message: Rise of the Dark Spark — 4 intro Bink videos renamed to .gfm-orig. Reversible. Same UE3 engine as TWFC so the filename layout matches; if a .bik still plays on your install, the case might differ — run 'ls' on the Movies folder and I'll case-correct.
notes: Intro skip only — RotDS is the High Moon Studios follow-up to TWFC, same TransGame/Movies/*.bik layout. Filenames from PCGW. Unlike TWFC there is NO FPS unlock recipe here — RotDS has less mature modding scene and no static patch exists. Marker file Startup.upk is a Steam-depot constant to distinguish this game from siblings without needing the exe name.
